titleStmt.title: SII 37.447: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 447. (A.R. No. B 4 of 1942-43.) Bhairāpuram, Nandikotkur Taluk, Kurnool District.

summary.p: Slab set up on the tank known as Fakkirama-Kuṇṭa about 4 km away from the village.
This is dated in Śaka 1527 Śōbhakṛit Jyēshṭha śu. 15. Irregular.

Incomplete. It registers a gift of land by Vōnāla Basuvaṇṇodeya, son of Liṅganeṇodeya, to Gaḍam Abureḍi for his having constructed a tank at Baijhrāpura which was granted to the former as on amaram fief by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Rāmarāju-Gōpālarājayya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīrastu . svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakava¨rṣa
ṁbulu 1527 Agunēṭi śōbhakṛtunāma saṁvatsara jyēṣṭha
śu 15 lu . śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīra
pratāpa śrīvīraveṁkaṭapatidēvamahārāya
layyavāru penugoṁḍapaṭnamaṁdu ratnasiṁhvā
sanārūḍhulai rājyaṁśāyagānu śrīmanmahāma
ḍalēśvara rāmarājugōpālarājayyadēva mahā
rājulayyavāri Amaragāṁda kurukugā
liṁganēnoḍeyala komāruṁḍa vōṇāla
basuvanōḍayalu gaḍaṁ Abure
ḍiki yicina śilāśāsanakramameṭlaṁnanu
māku gōpālarājayyagāru Amarā
naku yiccina bayirāpurāna nīvu kuṁṭavēyiṁcina
Aṁduku mānyamu vīrāmaracēni Aṁcu
ru veyicini sukanēla ga ma ciyi
Digital edition of SII 37.447 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
